inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of data points in the sample

inputs.label: Sorted Data (comma-separated)
inputs.businessContext: Sample values sorted in ascending order

inputs.label: Mean (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Mean of the hypothesized normal distribution

inputs.label: Standard Deviation (σ)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of the hypothesized normal distribution

formulas.computeZ: let data = inputs.sortedData.split(',').map(Number); let n = inputs.sampleSize; let mean = inputs.mean; let std = inputs.stdDev; let z = data.map(x => (x - mean) / std); return z;
formulas.computeCDF: let z = computeZ(); return z.map(zi => 0.5 * (1 + Math.erf(zi / Math.sqrt(2))));
formulas.computeAD: let cdf = computeCDF(); let n = inputs.sampleSize; let sum = 0; for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) { let term = (2 * (i + 1) - 1) * (Math.log(cdf[i]) + Math.log(1 - cdf[n - 1 - i])); sum += term; } let ad = -n - (1 / n) * sum; return ad;
formulas.computeAdjustedAD: let ad = computeAD(); let n = inputs.sampleSize; let adj = ad * (1 + 0.75 / n + 2.25 / (n * n)); return adj;
